task.name: Accessibility Review Task
task.objective: Review code and UI for WCAG 2.1 compliance

critical.mandate: Evaluate color contrast and screen reader support

step.title: Scope
step.action: Ask user for code/component to review

step.title: Semantic HTML and ARIA
step.action: Check for proper semantic HTML elements
Verify ARIA attributes, roles, and labels
Check for alt text on images, labels on form inputs

step.title: Keyboard and Focus
step.action: Check focus management and tab order

step.title: Visual and Screen Reader
step.action: Evaluate color contrast ratios (4.5:1 for text, 3:1 for large text)

step.title: Report
step.action: Generate findings with WCAG success criteria references

output.format: Markdown accessibility findings with WCAG criteria
output.location: Displayed to user (not saved unless requested)
